taxonomy: Callistachys procumbens is classified within the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and genetic characteristics. The Polygalaceae family consists of approximately 830 species of flowering plants, widely distributed across the globe. Callistachys procumbens is an endemic species found in South Africa, and its classification is essential for understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants. As a member of the Polygalaceae family, Callistachys procumbens shares characteristics with other milkwort species.
